data.title: D-Wave Quantum Analysts Highlight Strong Results, First System Sale, Growing Backlog
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc (NYSE: QBTS) reported upbeat Q4 results & is engaged with 3 institutions for quantum systems. Booked a sale to a German supercomputing center.

data.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Wheaton Precious Metals Stock In The Last 5 Years
Plug Power's 2025 Bet On Electrolyzers—J.P. Morgan Sees Growth But Stays Conservative
data.description: JP Morgan analyst shared takeaways from conference hosted for Plug Power. Talks focused on demand outlook, cost-saving initiatives, financial roadmap. New administration may support Texas DOE loan, but timeline unclear. Revenue guidance lowered due to macro headwinds and policy uncertainty. Electrolyzers are expected to be the top revenue driver in 2025.

data.title: Gold ETFs Shine As Spot Price Tops $3,000 During Safe-Haven Demand
data.description: Gold hits a record high, up 1.8% at $3,000/oz. Gold ETFs surge along with gold prices, top performers include GLD, IAU, GDX, GDXJ.

data.title: Donald Trump's Official Meme Coin, Worth $14.5 Billion On Inauguration Day, Is Down To $2.3 Billion
data.description: The Official Trump (CRYPTO: TRUMP) meme coin, associated with President Donald Trump, has plummeted 84% from its all-time high of $73.4, with its market cap shrinking from $14.5 billion to $2.3 billion, though it gained 13% in the last 24 hours
